name: campground-telegram-bot
description: Standalone Telegram bot for California campground monitoring

scripts.check: node scripts/check.ts src/bot.ts src/commands.ts src/config.ts src/media.ts src/monitor.ts src/monitor-config.ts src/runner-claude.ts src/runner-codex.ts src/runner-common.ts src/session-store.ts src/utils.ts && bash -n bin/run-bot.sh && bash -n bin/run-agent.sh
